hero.tagline: Pattern recognition. Automated execution. Surgical risk control. LAPLACE operates where discipline meets probability.

items.title: Pattern Recognition
items.desc: Proprietary Maru-Batsu strategy. Multi-layer sequence analysis across full shoe history.

items.title: Zero Touch Execution
items.desc: Table selection, bet sizing, result logging. Fully automated from entry to exit.

items.title: Risk Architecture
items.desc: Hard profit targets. Hard loss limits. Automatic session termination. No overrides.

items.title: Live Intelligence
items.desc: Win rate, P&L curve, set-by-set breakdown. Every hand accounted for.

items.title: Cloud Logic Engine
items.desc: Prediction computed server-side. Your machine handles execution only. Low latency.

items.title: Bound Distribution
items.desc: Each binary is cryptographically tied to your license. Redistribution is structurally impossible.

pricing.priceNote: USDT · One-time · Deducted from first charge
pricing.footnote: Daily profit share applied at end of each session day. Losses carry forward and offset future fees before any deduction is made.

steps.title: Pay
steps.desc: Purchase license with USDT. TRC-20 or ERC-20. Confirmed within 30 minutes.

steps.title: Download
steps.desc: Receive your personalized LAPLACE.exe. Bound to your license key.

steps.title: Connect
steps.desc: Sign into Stake once inside the built-in browser. Credentials stay local.

steps.title: Run
steps.desc: Press START. The system operates autonomously. No further input required.

items.q: How does the profit share work?
items.a: At end of each session day, net profit is calculated. A percentage is deducted from your balance. Losing days carry forward — no fees until prior losses are recovered.

items.q: What happens when the balance hits zero?
items.a: A 24-hour grace period activates. Bot pauses. Recharge at any time to resume. No penalties, no account loss.

items.q: How is the license fee charged?
items.a: Deducted automatically from your first charge. Pay $2,000 license + $3,000 charge = $3,000 operational balance.
USDT only. TRC-20 (TRON) or ERC-20 (Ethereum). Manual confirmation, typically under 30 minutes.

items.q: Can this run on a cloud machine?
items.a: Yes. Any Windows 10/11 environment — local or cloud. AWS WorkSpaces, Paperspace, Shadow PC all confirmed.
